info.name: Bee Flow
info.summary: AI assistant for your Nextcloud — chat with Files, Mail, Calendar, Deck, Notes, Tasks, Contacts and Talk.
info.description:
**Bee Flow turns your Nextcloud into an AI workspace.**
Click the bee icon in your top bar and chat with an assistant that already knows your files, mail, calendar and team. Ask it to summarise a long PDF, draft a reply to an email, find that document from last quarter, or schedule a meeting — Bee Flow does the work in the apps you already use.
## What you get
- **One-click install, zero configuration.** Sign-in with your existing Nextcloud account — no second password, no app-passwords, no API keys to paste anywhere. - **An AI agent with context.** Bee Flow can read and act on **Files, Mail, Calendar, Contacts, Deck, Notes, Tasks, Talk, Activity** and **Notifications** — only on the items you explicitly point it at. - **Built-in privacy shield.** Detects emails, phone numbers, IBANs, BSNs and other sensitive data in your prompts and replaces them with placeholders before anything reaches the language model. The original values are restored in the reply, only on your screen. - **Multi-user from day one.** Mirrors your Nextcloud users and groups automatically. Admins decide which groups get which Bee Flow integrations — disable Talk for interns, enable everything for the leadership team. - **Self-service for organisation admins.** A 4-step onboarding wizard walks the admin through user-sync mode, default permissions and privacy settings the first time they open Bee Flow. Re-configure anytime under Settings → Organisation.
## Screenshots
![Ask me anything — the chat landing screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Bee-Flow/connector/main/img/screenshots/01-chat.png)
*The default chat surface — sign in with your Nextcloud account and start a conversation.*
![Agents overview — browse and create assistants](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Bee-Flow/connector/main/img/screenshots/02-agents.png)
*Pre-built agents (Live Component Builder, SEO Blog Agent, Juridisch Assistent, …) plus a one-click "Create a new agent" wizard for your own.*
![Agent editor — configure tools, skills and instructions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Bee-Flow/connector/main/img/screenshots/03-agent-editor.png)
*Refine any agent: edit the system prompt, attach knowledge bases, enable Nextcloud apps and routines.*
## How it works
This Nextcloud app is a thin connector. It runs as an ExApp container next to your Nextcloud and bridges the embedded Bee Flow web client (an open-source React SPA) to the hosted Bee Flow service. Browser → Nextcloud signed proxy → connector → Bee Flow API. Your Nextcloud session is the only credential.
For self-hosters who want to run the entire stack on-premise: the connector, the SPA and the Bee Flow server are all open source ([Bee-Flow on GitHub](https://github.com/Bee-Flow)). The hosted service runs the same code under a [Sustainable Use Licence](https://beeflow.ai/license) and offers paid tiers for organisations that need automations, advanced analytics, DLP and SAML SSO.
## Data flow disclosure
When you act on a Nextcloud item, the connector sends the item to the Bee Flow service over TLS. Specifically:
- **Always** — your Nextcloud user ID, email, display name and group memberships (used to identify your tenant and apply group-based permissions). - **On demand** — the contents of items you explicitly point the assistant at (e.g. an email you ask it to summarise, a file you ask it to read).
Bee Flow **does not** bulk-export file contents, mail bodies, calendars or contacts. The connector forwards individual requests; nothing is copied, mirrored or indexed by default.
Full privacy policy: <https://beeflow.ai/privacy>.
## Getting started
1. Install this app from the Nextcloud App Store. 2. Open Bee Flow from the top bar. 3. The first time the organisation admin opens it, the onboarding wizard runs automatically — pick your user-sync mode and privacy settings. 4. Other users see a "Setup in progress" screen until the admin finishes — then the chat opens for everyone in the chosen sync scope.
A free **Community tier** (single user, basic chat, local knowledge base) is fully functional with no license key. To unlock automations, multi-user, DLP and other premium features, paste a license key from <https://beeflow.ai/pricing> into Settings → Organisation → License & Usage.
info.author: Bee Flow B.V.

variable.name: BEEFLOW_TENANT_KEY
variable.description: Leave at "auto" to provision a new Bee Flow organisation automatically the first time the connector starts. Override with a tenant key only if you're connecting this Nextcloud to an existing Bee Flow organisation (e.g. an enterprise reinstall).

variable.name: BEEFLOW_API_BASE_URL
variable.description: Where the connector sends API calls. Default points at the hosted Bee Flow service. Override only for staging or fully on-prem deployments.
